svg.text: Machine Learning Pipeline for Diabetes Risk Classification | Figure 8.1
Drop: diabetes_risk_score ⚠ DATA LEAKAGE — directly encodes target
Fit on train only → transform train+test
Combined with preprocessed X → X_final (4,800 × 21 features)
4 engineered + 17 original features | Computed BEFORE train/test split (no leakage)
LogReg trains on Z → final class prediction
Total fits: 20 iter × 5 folds = 100 model trains
* ✦ engineered feature — validates domain-driven FE strategy
Best Model: Soft Voting Ensemble (LR + MLP + SVM-RBF)
Classes: Low Risk | Prediabetes | High Risk
Figure 8.1 | System Architecture | ML-Based Diabetes Risk Classification | Research Proposal 2025
